'''Ia''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] who held the [[Police rank|rank]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] with the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] [[Traffic Division]].

==Biography==
Ia was a middle-aged Human female with a husky, monotonic voice, white hair, and no-nonsense manner. She took her job very seriously of policing the skylanes in her armored [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]], CS-117, and frequently tossed impolite traffic violators in the police lockup. Her strict attitudes brought her to consider [[Rybet/Legends|Rybet]] [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxi]] driver [[Nibber Swoo]] as her professional nemesis.<ref name="core" />
